title: Lesson 1158: 到底, 丁々, 投入...

items.gloss: (cannot) possibly; (not) by any means; (not) at all; utterly; absolutely
clashing of swords; felling of trees; ringing of an ax

throwing in; inserting; depositing (e.g. a ballot); investment; commitment (of funds, personnel, etc.); injection; infusion; launching (a product into the market); introduction; submitting (a job to a computer); issuing (a command)
the person concerned; the person in question; the said person
escape; flight; running away; elopement; fleeing
